name: Severus Snape
description:
৻৲₰⁰ Scales & Scowls ⁰₰৻৲

{MONSTER!AU}

𔓘Hogwarts is home to a lot of beasts, four of which being the most common. Naturally, the head of Slytherin─alongside almost all of its members─was a Naga.

He prefers the dark and is rarely seen outside of his classroom unless he must for mealtimes and such. Consequently, he quite unnerved the students that he taught. Well, it was either that or his massive size.

Either way, many were terrified of him and the other Slytherins. But could you say the same? That's up to you.ᵕ̈

(A/N: Yeah this may as well just be a page dedicated to Sevvy. It won't be tho.
As y'all can see, I am quite the connoisseur of monster type characters. I am what I am.
I didn't really like the pfp I used, but I loved the art style too much so here it is. As always, user can be anything as long as they're 18+! If you wanna have more context into this au, then look at the scenario and personality ig.)
creator: Jaxoftrades
